---
title: "People"
#image: files/group.jpeg
page-layout: full
listing:  #an example of listing external links
#  template: item-default-external.ejs
- id: lab-member
  sort: "title asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 250px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://drganghe.github.io
      image: https://drganghe.github.io/files/profile/gang-he-cuny-profile.jpg
      title: "Gang HE"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Assistant Professor, CUNY-Baruch College"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://kaifangluo.com
      image: /files/headshots/kaifang-luo.jpeg
      title: "Kaifang LUO"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Post-doc, CUNY-Baruch College"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://giselle1119.github.io/
      image: https://giselle1119.github.io/images/WengeRao.png
      title: "Wenge RAO"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Visiting PhD Student, CUNY-Baruch College"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 


- id: lab-alumni
  sort: "title asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center  
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 250px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kately-arriaga?trk=public_profile_browsemap-profile
      image: https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/C4E03AQHjmzgiuHhh-w/profile-displayphoto-shrink_200_200/0/1574827633673?e=2147483647&v=beta&t=SIy5lyl6RVArH6RqR1Ju0cCkekSgwSnNIPcpipdMSms
      title: "Kately ARRIAGE"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "MPA Student, CUNY-Baruch College"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nicolo-antonucci-73a89a216
      image: https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/C4D03AQGPajFlvlXQ_w/profile-displayphoto-shrink_200_200/profile-displayphoto-shrink_200_200/0/1625693949569?e=2147483647&v=beta&t=WAdd8HeHzq7Szm2vp79g-N5U6qGtmcdCd4XRBJKjD6g
      title: "Nicolo ANTONUCCI"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "MIA Student, CUNY-Baruch College"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

- id: lab-collaborator
  sort: "title asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center  
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 250px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://www.jhelvy.com/
      image: /files/headshots/john-helveston.png
      title: "John HELVESTON"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Assistant Professor, George Washington University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 


    - path: https://ccci.berkeley.edu/people/ccci-dai-fan
      image: https://ccci.berkeley.edu/sites/default/files/styles/unfurl_square_inside_800x800/public/Fan%20Dai.jpg
      title: "Fan DAI"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Director, California-China Climate Institute"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://liqunpeng.com
      image: /files/headshots/liqun-peng.jpeg
      title: "Liqun PENG"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Post-doc, Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://gps.ucsd.edu/faculty-directory/michael-davidson.html
      image: https://gps.ucsd.edu/_images/people/faculty/faculty_davidson.jpg
      title: "Michael DAVIDSON"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Assistant Professor, University of California, San Diego"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://es.ucsb.edu/people/ranjit-deshmukh
      image: https://es.ucsb.edu/sites/default/files/styles/max_650x650/public/2024-07/Deshmukh%2C%20Ranjit.jpg
      title: "Ranjit DESHMUKH"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Assistant Professor, University of California, Santa Barbara"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=tH4ODHUAAAAJ&hl=en
      image: https://bren.ucsb.edu/sites/default/files/styles/headshot/public/2020-06/Haozhe%20Yang_Bren%20Grad%202019_01.jpg
      title: "Haozhe YANG"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Post-doc, Princeton"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 


    - path: https://www.geog.hku.hk/lb-liu
      image: https://liulaibao.quarto.pub/lab/files/images/Photo_LiuLaibao.png
      title: "Laibao LIU"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Assistant Professor, Hong Kong University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://sem.tongji.edu.cn/semen/12413.html
      image: https://sem.tongji.edu.cn/semen/wp-content/uploads/sites/3/2015/08/zhangchao.jpg
      title: "Chao ZHANG"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Professor, Tongji University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: http://scholar.pku.edu.cn/qinyue/english
      image: /files/headshots/qin-yue.jpg
      title: "Yue QIN"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Associate Professor, Peking University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://mhqiu.github.io/
      image: https://www.stonybrook.edu/commcms/somas/people/_profiles/images/minghao-qiu.jpg
      title: "Minghao QIU"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Assistant Professor, Stony Brook University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: http://faculty.dess.tsinghua.edu.cn/liuzhu/en/index.htm
      image: /files/headshots/liu-zhu.png
      title: "Zhu LIU"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Professor, Tsinghua University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://environment.fudan.edu.cn/5b/8e/c26241a351118/page.htm
      image: https://environment.fudan.edu.cn/_upload/article/images/7d/fa/eca42c684c10b92aea0e95cec531/4c635dba-fa36-430c-ba9d-86a05cb473ee.jpg
      title: "Hongliang ZHANG"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Professor, Fudan University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://www.tsinghua.edu.cn/enven/info/1052/1977.htm
      image: https://www.tsinghua.edu.cn/__local/E/89/16/1FC96223449A59CE0A0F2150E2E_13611419_299E.jpg
      title: "Xi LU"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Professor, Tsinghua University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 


    - path: https://sustainablesolutions.stanford.edu/people/shi-chen
      image: https://sustainablesolutions.stanford.edu/sites/g/files/sbiybj31186/files/styles/medium_square/public/media/image/chen_1.jpg
      title: "Shi CHEN"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Post-doc, Carnegie Science"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=l1Yz7rEAAAAJ&hl=en
      image: https://scholar.googleusercontent.com/citations?view_op=medium_photo&user=l1Yz7rEAAAAJ&citpid=1
      title: "Qian LUO"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Post-doc, Princeton University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://www.edf.org/people/matthias-fripp
      image: https://www.edf.org/sites/default/files/experts/EDF-Headshot-MFripp.jpg
      title: "Matthias FRIPP"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Associate Vice President, Modelling, Mapping and Analytics, Environmental Defense Fund"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 


- id: lab-advisor
  sort: "title asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center  
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 250px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://kammen.berkeley.edu/
      image: /files/headshots/daniel-kammen.jpg
      title: "Daniel M. KAMMEN"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Professor, Univeristy of California, Berkeley"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://eta.lbl.gov/people/jiang-lin
      image: https://are.berkeley.edu/sites/are.berkeley.edu/files/styles/user_big_picture/public/pictures/picture-13749-1602716599.jpg
      title: "Jiang LIN"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Staff Scientist, Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
toc: false

format:
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
---

<!--Please delete or replace with your own clarity-->
{{< include /files/includes/_msclarity.qmd >}}

## Team

:::{#lab-member}
:::


## Alumni

:::{#lab-alumni}
:::


## Collaborators

We are fortunate to have collaborated with many researchers and practitioners. Please visit their websites to learn more about their amazing work.

:::{#lab-collaborator}
:::


## Advisors

:::{#lab-advisor}
:::



<!--

## Researchers

::: {.grid}

<!--Lecture 1-2-->

<!--

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](https://drganghe.github.io/files/profile/gang-he-cuny-profile.jpg)

<center> 

Assistant Professor, CUNY-Baruch College

[Gang He](https://drganghe.github.io)

</center>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](/files/headshots/kaifang-luo.jpeg)

<center>

Post-doc, CUNY-Baruch College

[Kaifang Luo](https://kaifangluo.com)

</center>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](/files/images/we-need-you.png)

<center>Join us</center>

:::

:::

## Collaborators

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](https://gps.ucsd.edu/_images/people/faculty/faculty_davidson.jpg){height="200pt" fig-align="center"}

<center>[Michael Davidson](https://gps.ucsd.edu/faculty-directory/michael-davidson.html)</center>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/9012994?v=4){height="200pt" fig-align="center"}

<center>[John Helveston](https://www.jhelvy.com/)</center>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](/files/headshots/liqun-peng.jpeg){height="200pt" fig-align="center"}

<center>[Liqun Peng](https://eta.lbl.gov/people/liqun-peng-0)</center>

:::

:::

-->

<!--
## Advisors

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](https://kammen.berkeley.edu/images/Kammen_solar.jpg){height="200pt" fig-align="center"}

<center>[Daniel Kammen](https://kammen.berkeley.edu/)</center>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](https://are.berkeley.edu/sites/are.berkeley.edu/files/styles/user_big_picture/public/pictures/picture-13749-1602716599.jpg?itok=i8mLR_AR){fig-align="center"}

<center>[Jiang Lin](https://are.berkeley.edu/users/jiang-lin)</center>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](https://cee.princeton.edu/sites/g/files/toruqf2216/files/styles/3x4_750w_1000h/public/people/mauzerall.jpg?itok=ilA0fH9K){height="200pt" fig-align="center"}

<center>[Denise L. Mauzerall](https://mauzerall.scholar.princeton.edu/)</center>

:::

:::
-->
